claim: Opera Ballet Vlaanderen presents Carmen at Opera Antwerp on May 29, 31, June 2, 3, 5, 7 (matinee), 9, 10, 12, 13, 2026, directed and choreographed by Wim Vandekeybus.
quote: Carmen | Opera Vlaanderen, Antwerp | May 29, 31, Jun 02, 03, 05, 07 mat, 09, 10, 12, 13

claim: Opera Ballet Vlaanderen's 2026/27 season includes La traviata in December 2026, Lohengrin in concert form, a new Sleeping Beauty by Marcos Morau, and Der Schmied von Gent set in 16th-century Ghent.
quote: twelve major productions, including seven world premieres and six new works ... La traviata ... December 2026 ... directed by Tom Goossens ... Der Schmied von Gent ... staged by Ersan Mondtag, set in 16th-century Ghent

claim: Opera Gent closes from January 2026 for major renovation; spring 2026 ballet productions Rites and OPUS are presented at Capitole Gent instead.
quote: From January 2026, Opera Gent temporarily closes her doors for a major renovation and restoration. After the temporary closure of Opera Ghent, two ballet productions will be presented in spring 2026 at Capitole Gent: Rites (Bolero X, La Valse, Le Sacre du printemps) and OPUS.

claim: OPUS, Christos Papadopoulos's choreography on Bach's Die Kunst der Fuge, runs in Ghent on May 7, 9 and 10, 2026.

De Bijloke's May 2026 classical line-up includes Isata Kanneh-Mason (May 1), Sol Gabetta with Antwerp Symphony Orchestra playing Elgar's cello concerto (May 9), Renaud Capuçon with Symfonieorkest Vlaanderen in Brahms & Schumann (May 15-16), and Vilde Frang with Kammerorchester Basel (May 24).
quote: Maanlicht en nachtblauw - Isata Kanneh-Mason - vrijdag 1 mei 2026 ... Het Celloconcerto van Elgar - Sol Gabetta & Antwerp Symphony Orchestra - zaterdag 9 mei 2026 ... Brahms & Schumann - Renaud Capuçon & Symfonieorkest Vlaanderen - vrijdag 15 / zaterdag 16 mei

claim: Bijloke Wonderland summer culture festival runs August 20-30, 2026 on the Bijloke site with sunrise concerts, free summer-bar concerts, theatre, dance and visual art.
quote: prikkelende concerten bij zonsopgang, gratis zomerbar-concerten, theater, dans, beeldende kunst & rondleidingen

claim: Handelsbeurs/Ha Concerts in May 2026 features a string of jazz and world-music dates including Mattias De Craene ft. Black Koyo (May 6), Bram De Looze Trio (May 7), and 'Grieving together, healing together' world-music gathering (May 17).
quote: May 6 - Mattias De Craene ft. Black Koyo (Jazz/World) - 'Jazz and electronics meets Gnawa music' ... May 17 - Grieving together, healing together (World)

claim: Miet Warlop's ONE SONG plays its final NTGent run on June 4, 5, 6 2026 at the NTGent Schouwburg, in English, with tickets €15-28.
quote: Language: English ... Ticket Price: €15-28 ... runs June 4-6, 2026 at NTGent Schouwburg in Ghent

claim: NTGent's announced calendar lists One Song (June 2026) and Living Apartment Together by Yves Degryse / BERLIN & NTGent (September 2026) among the post-spring 2026 productions.
quote: One Song - Miet Warlop / Irene Wool & ntgent - June 2026 ... Living Apartment Together - Yves Degryse / BERLIN & ntgent - September 2026

claim: Viernulvier's Vooruit front-building reopens with the Housewarming festival February 3-8, 2026 — Jan Martens's remake of THE DOG DAYS ARE OVER, Apparat live, plus a hyperpop night and Sunday open house.
quote: Van dinsdag 3 tot zondag 8 februari 2026 ... een spectaculaire remake van 'THE DOG DAYS ARE OVER' van Jan Martens ... Apparat ... hyperpop avond met Catnapp, Zonmai

claim: Toneelhuis's spring 2026 programme at the Bourla includes FC Bergman's The Sheep Song (April 30 – May 2, 2026) and Olympique Dramatique's ALL TOGETHER NOW! (April 30 – May 21, 2026).
quote: The Sheep Song (April 30 – May 2, 2026) ... ALL TOGETHER NOW! (April 30 – May 21, 2026) ... Family (April 30, 2026) ... Midzomernachtsdroom (May 2, 2026)

claim: Capitole Gent hosts a stream of comedy and tribute concerts in May 2026 including An Evening With Alex Agnew (May 12) and the Comedy Marathon (May 11), alongside Opera Ballet Vlaanderen's Rites and OPUS.
quote: May 2026 will feature the Comedy Marathon (May 11), An Evening With Alex Agnew (May 12), and multiple performances by Arnout Van Den Bossche and Yannick Noben
